command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Search plugin-state SQLite DBs for the spam (runtime settings) ==="
for db in /home/jose/.openclaw/plugin-state/*.sqlite* /home/jose/.openclaw/*.sqlite* /home/jose/.openclaw/**/*.db; do
  [ -f "$db" ] || continue
  echo "--- $db ---"
  strings "$db" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "A_ToolsX|ToolsX|join.*channel|must join|VIEW CHANNEL|t.me/A_" | head -5
done

echo ""
echo "=== Search ALL openclaw data files (not just code) for spam strings ==="
grep -rli "A_ToolsX\|must join our channel\|To use this bot" /home/jose/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null | grep -vE "node_modules|\.js\.map" | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== Check audit log (crestodian.jsonl) - shows what bot did ==="
grep -iE "A_ToolsX|join.*channel|must join|send_message" /home/jose/.openclaw/audit/crestodian.jsonl 2>/dev/null | tail -5 | cut -c1-200

echo ""
echo "=== Search for 'forceSubscribe' / 'requireChannel' / 'joinGate' settings ==="
grep -rliE "forceSubscribe|requireChannel|joinGate|mustJoin|channelGate|subscription" /home/jose/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null | grep -vE "node_modules" | head -10
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json')); import re; s=json.dumps(d); print('spam in config:', 'A_ToolsX' in s or 'join' in s.lower())"

echo ""
echo "=== The SOUL/identity files - did attacker inject into Remy's persona? ==="
grep -riE "A_ToolsX|must join|join our channel|t.me" /home/jose/.openclaw/workspace/ 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo "--- SOUL.md spam check ---"
grep -iE "A_ToolsX|join|channel|t.me" /home/jose/.openclaw/workspace/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null | head -5
REMOTE
